message:
Complete CLI help documentation updates

Additional help page updates:
- basic-usage/page.tsx: Additional usage examples
- installation/page.tsx: More installation details
- search-commands/page.tsx: Search command refinements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -43,6 +43,31 @@ FLAGS: --help, -h Show help --version, -v Show version`} +

Free vs Pro

+

+ The CLI is free to build and use with the public prompt library. Pro unlocks your private + vault and premium content. +

+
    +
  • + Free: list/search/show/copy/render/export public prompts, bundles, + and JSON output +
    • +
  • + Pro: personal prompts (list --mine, list --saved, + search --mine, search --saved, search --all), + plus save, sync, notes, collections, + and packs (premium pack installs) +
    • +
+

+ If you log in on a free plan, Pro-only flags will prompt you to upgrade. +

+

+ Learn more about Pro at{" "} + pro.jeffreysprompts.com/pricing. +

+

Listing prompts

{`# List all prompts
 jfp list

@@ -17,6 +17,11 @@ export default function InstallationPage() {

The jfp CLI gives you terminal access to the entire JeffreysPrompts library.

+

+ The CLI is free to install and use with public prompts. Pro accounts unlock private vault + access (list --mine, search --saved), plus save/sync, notes, + collections, and premium packs. +

Quick install

@@ -55,7 +55,11 @@ jfp i`}
  • Press Esc to cancel
    • -

    Search scopes (premium)

    +

    Search scopes (Pro)

    +

    + Pro search scopes require logging in with a Pro subscription. The CLI itself is free to + build and use with public prompts. + 

    {`# Search your personal prompts
 jfp search "review" --mine
 
@@ -110,7 +114,7 @@ jfp show "$(jfp search "wizard" --json | jq -r '.results[0].id')"
 jfp show "$(jfp search "review" --json | jq -r '.results[0].id')" --raw | pbcopy
 
 # Export all search results
-jfp search "debugging" --json | jq -r '.results[].id' | xargs jfp export --format skill`}
    +jfp search "debugging" --json | jq -r '.results[].id' | xargs jfp export --format md`}

    Registry cache

    @@ -134,8 +138,8 @@ jfp list --category debugging`} 

    {`# Find all prompts for a project type
 jfp search "testing" --json > my-testing-prompts.json
 
-# Export as Skills for Claude Code
-jfp search "robot mode" --json | jq -r '.results[].id' | xargs jfp export --format skill`}
    +# Export as Markdown +jfp search "robot mode" --json | jq -r '.results[].id' | xargs jfp export --format md`}
